steps.name: project-setup
steps.summary: Gradle 빌드 설정 완료 (settings.gradle, build.gradle, gradlew), Spring Boot 스켈레톤(MarketplaceApplication.java, application.yml), React/Vite 프론트엔드 초기화 완료 (frontend/package.json, vite.config.ts, tsconfig.json, tailwind, App.tsx 등)

steps.name: domain-layer
steps.summary: JPA 엔티티 4종(User, Prompt, Purchase, RefreshToken) + 열거형 2종(PromptType, TargetRole) 생성 완료

steps.name: auth-layer
steps.summary: JWT(JwtProvider, JwtFilter) + OAuth2(OAuth2UserService, OAuth2SuccessHandler) + SecurityConfig 구현 완료, JwtProviderTest 통과
